reviews.comment:
No me gustó que siendo gigante el lugar no tengan destinado un espacio decente para las motos. Te las quieren hacer poner en un lugar imposible de controlar si estás tomando algo en el café. Tuve que ponerme firme y dejé igual la moto. Luego vinieron 3 policías motorizados a los que les hice lugar y con los que compartimos el espacio. Les dejo la foto. Está para que lo piensen los del ACA. Aunque no tengamos auto, si somos viajeros...

(Translated by Google)
I didn't like the fact that, despite the huge size of the place, they didn't have a decent space for motorcycles. They wanted to force them to sit in a spot that's impossible to control if you're having a drink at the café. I had to stand my ground and left the motorcycle alone. Then three motorcycle police officers came over, and I made room for them, and we shared the space with them. I'll leave the photo. It's something for the ACA to think about. Even if we don't have a car, we're travelers...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBaTVDX3NRRRAB
